Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class FpslEnrollmentMetadata

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.FpslEnrollmentMetadata
public class FpslEnrollmentMetadata extends Object
FpslEnrollmentMetadata

Metadata for the FULLY_PAID_STOCK_LENDING enrollment type
